title: STATUS 4 Socket Cable Reel, 15m, Green, 13 Amp, Thermal Cut Out, Heavy Duty, Outdoor Extension Lead, Ideal for Garden, DIY, Workshop, Power Tools (S15M13ACR4)
features: MID-RANGE POWER SOLUTION FOR OUTDOOR TASKS STATUS 4 socket cable reel offers 15 metres of green extension lead, ideal for delivering safe and reliable power across gardens, garages, and work areas. Suitable for both home improvement and light commercial use.

FOUR SOCKETS FOR MULTI-DEVICE CONNECTION Fitted with four 13 amp sockets, allowing multiple tools or appliances to be powered at the same time. Perfect for electric lawnmowers, trimmers, outdoor lighting, and workshop machinery.

SAFETY-FIRST WITH THERMAL CUT OUT PROTECTION Designed with a built-in thermal cut out to disconnect power in the event of overheating or overload. Provides essential safety for continuous use and protects connected devices from damage.

DURABLE DESIGN WITH PORTABLE CASING Constructed with a heavy duty reel housing and impact-resistant outer frame for frequent handling and rough conditions. The compact frame and green cable offer visibility and safe storage after use.

PEACE OF MIND WITH 1 YEAR WARRANTY Supplied with a 1 year manufacturer warranty to cover defects in materials or craftsmanship. The STATUS 15m cable reel offers trusted, safe performance for powering multiple outdoor electrical devices.
description: Product Description Status socket outlet with thermal out cable reel is easy to use. sockets comes all with their own 4 switch. 15 metre reel length, 13 amp rated. Ideal for use around the home or workplace. Recyclable materials. CE certified. Supplied in hand bag style. High Standards of quality and conformity form the corner stone of our policy resulting in the continual growth of Status International. Box Contains 1x Cable Reel
